entity.summary: British Virgin Islands-established centralized exchange offering crypto, forex, and stock-CFD trading with AI-assisted features.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0046. AIVORA's official About Us page states that the platform was established in 2024 in the British Virgin Islands and later set up subsidiaries in Dubai, Malaysia, and Singapore. HEI uses the founding jurisdiction rather than the later subsidiary locations.

events.title: Aivora Exchange present in exchange source data
events.description: Aivora Exchange is recorded as an active centralized exchange, with its British Virgin Islands establishment supported by the platform's official company profile.
events.notes: Upgrade with a precise launch-date event if stronger dated material becomes available.
